sql: SELECT id, name, email, status, department, created_at FROM users WHERE CASE WHEN #{filter} = 'active_admins' THEN status = 'active' AND department = 'Admin' WHEN #{filter} = 'active_managers' THEN status = 'active' AND department = 'Manager' WHEN #{filter} = 'active_users' THEN status = 'active' WHEN #{filter} = 'inactive' THEN status = 'inactive' WHEN #{filter} = 'pending' THEN status = 'pending' WHEN #{filter} = 'by_dept' AND #{dept} IS NOT NULL THEN department = #{dept} ELSE 1=1 END ORDER BY CASE WHEN #{sort} = 'name' THEN name WHEN #{sort} = 'date' THEN created_at WHEN #{sort} = 'status' THEN status ELSE id END
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, email, status, department, created_at FROM users
<choose>
    <when test="filter == 'active_admins'">
        WHERE status = 'active' AND department = 'Admin'
    </when>
    <when test="filter == 'active_managers'">
        WHERE status = 'active' AND department = 'Manager'
    </when>
    <when test="filter == 'active_users'">
        WHERE status = 'active'
    </when>
    <when test="filter == 'inactive'">
        WHERE status = 'inactive'
    </when>
    <when test="filter == 'pending'">
        WHERE status = 'pending'
    </when>
    <when test="filter == 'by_dept' and dept != null">
        WHERE department = #{dept}
    </when>
    <otherwise>
        WHERE 1=1
    </otherwise>
</choose>
<choose>
    <when test="sort == 'name'">
        ORDER BY name
    </when>
    <when test="sort == 'date'">
        ORDER BY created_at
    </when>
    <when test="sort == 'status'">
        ORDER BY status
    </when>
    <otherwise>
        ORDER BY id
    </otherwise>
</choose>
